title: Madness Entities (Crazy Monsters)
description: This mod adds a variety of items, structures, dimensions, and powerful mobs such as "The Sun", "The Moon", "Popbob", "Null", and "Herobrine". Do not be afraid of them.
body:
# Can you survive under their pressure? ### This mod adds a variety of items, structures, dimensions, and strong mobs.
If you encounter any issues with this mod, please leave a comment.

CurseForge [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/madness-entities-mod/comments](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/madness-entities-mod/comments) GitHub [https://github.com/ExecutorWither/MadnessEntities/issues](https://github.com/ExecutorWither/MadnessEntities/issues) # Mobs
Overworld ### Hornet ![Hornet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8cca022c8d6b79841002024197682d5121932ae.png) Spawns naturally in day.
Ability: Gives Poison debuff. ### Hornet Nest ![Hornet Nest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb8dfda6386df2d386138ac34052ead4104a90f4.png) Spawns near the Tree.
Ability: Summons Hornets in Daytime. ### Skeletal Launcher ![Skeletal Launcher](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb4fc105320ebc84a184bca77dbca2101aeb7f47.png) Spawns naturally at night or in caves.
Ability: Shoots a arrow every few seconds. ### Overpowered Launcher (Mini Boss) ![Overpowered Launcher](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48b9c70cdeccdfc04efac2b9326ec7ebeb1e5462.png) Spawns naturally at night or in caves.
Ability: Invincible while fire particles are on his back. Shoots various projectiles every few seconds.
Drop: Resistance 100%, Some Items Related to Diamonds 100%
**Recommended equipment: Netherite Armor + Netherite Sword** ### Crazy Zombie ![CrazyZombie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c321d539265d321782c5c7790a46d1906327f4da.png) Spawns naturally at night or in caves.
Ability: Transforms target mobs into Crazy Zombie. ### Crazy Enderman ![CrazyEnderman](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5ae5ff1041d8983f4f135fdbe8ae647d9314039.png) Spawns naturally at night or in caves.
Ability: Summons Endermen when his health is low. ### Crazy Spider ![CrazySpider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/138388f0936ec81727f131b39cba1c8176a4dea8.png) Spawns naturally at night or in caves.
Ability: Becomes Invisible few seconds and places a cobweb at target location. ### Crazy Skeleton ![CrazySkeleton](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5909e2e90874d2a68a070e13d61552e5c3c436cb.png) Spawns naturally at night or in caves.
Ability: Summons Many Arrows when his health is low. ### Crazy Creeper ![CrazyCreeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e02e9cbd670f0634b7775e03092e3d45d7535d5.png) Spawns naturally at night or in caves.
Ability: Explosion radius increases as his health is low.
Nether ### Flame Launcher ![Flame Launcher](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05b8b6b4dfdfe5d1baa34539583406d093c0bd30.png) Spawns naturally.
Ability: Shoots a fireball every few seconds. ### Wither Launcher ![Wither Launcher](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ed95f08ad5260bfed095598385b81ca1cba15c3.png) Spawns naturally.
Ability: Shoots a wither skull every few seconds. ### Crazy Wither Skeleton ![CrazyWitherSkeleton](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f2a815ff7300d8603d6f53c65d94418cf882326.png) Spawns naturally.
Ability: Gives Unknown debuff. ### Crazy Ghast ![CrazyGhast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f2f930e2c278393c0e174328b84e2c22a68f00e_0.webp) Spawns naturally.
Ability: The number of fireballs increases as his health decreases.
Drop: Some Random Items Related to Ghast or Nether 100%, Evil Crystals 100% ### Crazy Blaze ![CrazyBlaze](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0c4220dc7420614c9f17de4c700bb81f2e5a708.png) Spawns naturally.
Ability: The number of small fireballs increases as his health decreases.
Drop: Some Random Items Related to Blaze or Nether 100%, Evil Crystals 100%
All Dimensions ### Player ![CrazyPlayer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8be277381415512a667368d24eb6d8bfc22bffb0.png) Spawns naturally.
Ability: Can see players' location wherever they are. ### Crazy Knight ![CrazyKnight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99a3e92493f8e668fc32a06b8026c8a7453c8ed7.png) Spawns naturally.
Ability: Can see players' location wherever they are.
Laboratory ### Researcher ![Researcher](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f44d55d9bdf06e3f6d3ec9694bb86257900ac3e1_0.webp) Spawns in the Laboratory. ### Dr. Axiomaniac ![Doctor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b032e60341ed40bb86bf196e4a9d8fc1e402af2.png) Spawns in the Laboratory.
Bosses ### The Chess Spawns from a spawn egg dropped by Evokers.
Ability: When their health is below 50%, thier behavior changes.
### KILLER OF DARKNESS ![kightBoss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25375a225c8f232dd4865e12d028785b4cf1c16f.png) Spawns at the top of the Castle.
Ability: In special seed, he can summons his small minions.
His health increases.
His health increases more than in the "dawn on the world" seed.
Drop: Some Random Items 100%, Omega Souls 100% ### Crazy Wither ![CrazyWither](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0f784dfc697f7654735d0f6f5e39f19437848d4.png) Spawns from a spawn egg dropped by KILLER OF DARKNESS or Xenodrake.
His health increases.
His health increases more than in the "dawn on the world" seed.
Drop: Heart of Wither 100%, Omega Souls 100% ### Xenodrake ![Robot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/048d7fc88fd98c95cee9de23ef71767157fdbe83.png) After being defeated, Dr. Axiomaniac spawns Xenodrake.
Ability: Gives Cancel Flying debuff. Can fly when its health is below 50%.
His health increases.
His health increases more than in the "dawn on the world" seed.
Drop: Some Random Items 100%, Curcuit Boards 100%, Omega Souls 100%
Special Mobs (Removed Spawn Eggs after Come From Hell Update) ### Clothes Hanger ![ClothesHanger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbb19b31892be8b2c0e6cb919b59ed40f635d01a_0.webp) Using command can spawns Clothes Hangers. ### Gorilla ![Gorilla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4335ae67022962a159bf5cd420712bd3fa56c7e0.png) Using command can spawns Gorillas. ### Entity303 ![Entity303](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39ecb44bbe356548a199285b40e46e998c88e91b.png) Using command can spawns Entity303.
Event Bosses The Sun and The Moon naturally spawn at night after defeating KILLER OF DARKNESS . ## Recomended Equipment Vanilla Armor and Weapons such as the netherite one ## Progression **The Sun and The Moon enrage if KILLER OF DARKNESS has not been defeated in the same world.** ### The Sun ![The Sun](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49dd2560ce21c6abec3af34511070403d6ae9bbf_0.webp) The Sun is a hostile boss entity that specializes in high-damage, telegraphed attacks and area denial. Spawns from spawn egg called "**Residual Star**"
Drop: a Magic Book(Meteor) 100%, Star Fragments 100%, Executioner Souls 100% ### Abilities **Telegraphed Charge Attack** : Before charging, the Sun displays a visible warning line indicating its dash trajectory. After a short delay, it rushes along this line at high speed. **Teleport** : The Sun teleports around its target. **Charged Fireball Shower** : After a short charging period, the Sun releases a continuous rain of fireballs over a wide area. Remaining within the target zone results in severe sustained damage. Solar Beam : The Sun emits a powerful beam attack that sweeps or locks onto an area, dealing sustained fire damage. **Homing Flames** : The Sun releases tracking flames that pursue the player for a short duration, punishing predictable movement patterns. ### The Moon ![The Moon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/107d8e26b8de04e979b4121f5e92d4beb42d7694_0.webp) The Moon is a hostile boss entity with multiple combat behaviors beyond simple charge attacks. In addition to high-speed rushes, it employs various moon-related abilities to pressure the player. Spawns from spawn egg called "**The Hollow Witness**"
Drop: Star Fragments 100%, Executioner Souls 100% ### Abilities **Charge Attack** : The Moon repeatedly performs high-speed charges toward the player, forming the core of its behavior pattern. **Summon Lunar Entities** : The Moon periodically summons enemies associated with the moon. These summoned entities harass the player and can interfere with positioning during charge attacks. **Gravity Manipulation (WIP)** : The Moon can temporarily alter gravity, causing the player to float, fall rapidly, or lose control of movement. This ability makes precise positioning significantly more difficult. **Beam Attack** : In certain phases, the Moon emits powerful beam attacks that deal continuous or high burst damage if the player remains in their path.
Pre-End Contents ## Recomended Equipment Vanilla Armor and Weapons such as the netherite one ## Progression **Null, Herobrine Notch enrage if The Sun and The Moon have not been defeated in the same world.** **??? enrages if Null, Herobrine and Notch have not been defeated in the same world.** ### Null ![null](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/daa1ec344810bebc8c05d78dc2ef0e3dd0a77e9f.png) Spawns from spawn egg called "**Face of Nothing**"
Drop: a Magic Book(Lightning) 50%, a Magic Book(Evoke Structures) 50%, Executioner Souls 100% ### Herobrine ![Herobrine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4db37dae2497e01578a34ed8ec41acfe2d11fc89.png) Spawns from spawn egg called "**Unwanted Presence**"
Drop: a Magic Book(Lightning) 50%, a Magic Book(Evoke Structures) 50%, Executioner Souls 100% ### Notch ![Notch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fddce2b7863a7400efa71158b409c93e3bf661c.png) Spawns from spawn egg called "**Portrait of the Creator**"
Drop: a Magic Book(Lightning) 50%, a Magic Book(Evoke Structures) 50%, Executioner Souls 100% ### ??? ![???](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14049c2f05bbe6ff77c7569146262adff9bc6bd5.png) Spawns from spawn egg called "**Forbidden Receiver**"
Drop: a Magic Book(Blackhole) 100%, a Magic Book(Lightning) 50%, a Magic Book(Evoke Structures) 50%, Executioner Souls 100% , a **Restricted Skull Adviser** 100%
End Contents (Added after Comes From Hell Update)

※Warning : This spoiler contains Horror contents. ### ANCIENT NETHER AVATAR ![EndBoss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8a9b875d6542abc348e77ea55f499804e483a69.png) Spawns from spawn egg called "Restricted Skull Adviser"
Drop: ??? ## Recomended Equipment Vanilla Weapons such as the netherite one ## Progression **ANCEINT NETHER AVATOR enrages if Null, Herobrine and Notch have not been defeated in the same world.**
# Weapons ### Epic Diamond Sword - Recipe: Same as vanilla swords, but requires 2 Condensed Diamonds. ### Resistance Sword - Recipe: Same as vanilla swords, but requires 2 Resistance items. ### Evil Sword - Recipe: The left one in the lower image.
![evils](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93aa4b68fbbfa31a2dbc11781650be000b86149e.png)
Requires: an Epic Diamond Sword and Evil Crystals. ### Sharpness Sword - Recipe:
The right one in the upper image.
Requires: a Resistance Sword and Evil Crystals. ### Disaster Excalibur -Dropped by Dr. Axiomaniac ### Planet Eater - Recipe:
![star_sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7160e564f2b4ea5ce9b40f6e031b24c040842b96.png)
Requires: an Obsidian and Star Fragments. ### Sword of Genocide - Recipe:
![crazy_sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e92a7b4023bdea2fe832bcca5ed15b700289354c.png)
Requires: Omega Souls, Executioner Souls, a Planet Eater, a Disaster Excalibur, a Sharpness Sword, a Evil Sword, a Resistance Sword and an Epic Diamond Sword. ### ??? # Armor ![armors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0b98ea8a46360ddcaed2bc064a14e3e2aa7bf55.png) ### Dirt Armor - Recipe: Same as vanilla armor, but requires 24 dirt. ### Planks Armor - Recipe: Same as vanilla armor, but requires 24 oak planks. ### Stone Armor - Recipe: Same as vanilla armor, but requires 24 cobblestones. ### Nether Star Armor - 30% Damage Reduction - Recipe: Same as vanilla armor, but requires 24 nether stars. ### Epic Diamond Armor - 40% Damage Reduction - Recipe: Same as vanilla armor, but requires 24 Condensed Diamonds. ### Resistance Armor - Buff: Resistance - Recipe: Same as vanilla armor, but requires 24 Resistance items. ### Dragon Armor - Death occurs after 10 seconds - 80% Damage Reduction - Recipe: Same as vanilla armor, but requires 24 Dragon Scales. ### Debug Armor - Creative Only - Recipe: None ### Crazy Armor - Clear Vanilla Debuffs - Recipe: ![crazy_armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f6f9e572fae3017e66ff4b611b66e6fd22e103b.png)
Requires: Executioner Souls, Resistance Armor and Epic Diamond Armor. ## Accessories Elder Tablet (100% dropped by Elder Guardians)
Immunity to Mining Fatigue
Wither Skeleton Heart (1% dropped by Wither Skeleton, Crazy Wither Skeletons)
Immunity to Wither
Feather (5% dropped by Chicken)
Immunity to Slowness
RevivalEye (5% dropped by Crazy Knights, Killer of Darkness, Crazy Players)
Immunity to Blindness and Darkness
BacteriaDetector (1% dropped by Zombies, Crazy Zombies)
Immunity to Hunger
Capsule (5% dropped by Villagers)
Immunity to Nausea
GravityAnchor (5% dropped by Shulkers)
Immunity to Levitation PoisonRemover (5% dropped by Cave Spiders, Hornets)
Immunity to Poison
Eye of Truth
Ability: Increases armor penetration by 5
Fated Dice
Ability: 10% chance to take no damage\n2% chance to revive with 15% HP when killed ![upper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f88c0744d7b0337b0ca2412fcad8a2606db97eb.png)
Diamond Glove (Right)
Ability: Immunity to Weakness ![boost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76970890dc0ac206934927cb65b190056c809a42.png)
Velocity Emblem (Left)
Ability: 20% increased Movement Speed
Requires: Evil Crystals and a Gold Ingot.

Moon Charm (Right)
Ability: Gains increased power at night
Requires: Vampire Cells (10% dropped by Bats)
![letter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/faa35ea4221b2fc5de513a931b54122fc30ef1dd.png)
Letter (Left)

Bloody Letter (Right)
Ability: 30% increased Damage Reduction\nReflects 30% of Damage Taken
Requires: a Letter and Evil Crystals
![metalic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5708d78aff44a6fbd8c12c8d233c9f0b2e5f8cd9.png)
Metalic Core (Left)
Ability: 30% increased Damage Reduction
Requires: an Iron Block Iron Ingots and Resistance items.

Molten Core (Right)
Ability: 30% increased Damage & 30% decreased Damage Reduction
Requires: Blaze Powders and a Metalic Core
![holy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77c93ffe3a4d2a47f59ade0a770f1a153fd9c94a.png)
Void Star (Left)
Ability: 25% increased Invulnerability Duration
Requires: Omega Souls and a Heart of Wither

Holy Charm (Right)
Ability: Grants immunity to most debuffs
Requires: an Elder Tablet, a Wither Skeleton Heart, a Feather, a RevivalEye, aBacteriaDetector, a Capsule, a GravityAnchor and a PoisonRemover
# Credits The Sun & The Moon - Beam SE: "Biodynamic - Impact, Braam, Tonal, Dark" Sound Effect by Bryan Jesus De Los Santos Breton from Pixabay - Spawn SE: "Horror Background Music" Sound Effect by DRAGON-STUDIO from Pixabay Ancient Nether Avator - Scream SE: "Scream Sound SFX" Sound Effect by Jusatti890 from Pixabay - Summon Skulls SE: "Flesh Growing (Horror)" Sound Effect by Aman Kumar from Pixabay - Beam SE: "Horror Orchestra Warning" Sound Effect by The-Vampires-Monster Soundtrack from Pixabay - Tear Rain SE: "Scary sound effect" Sound Effect by Hemant Goliya from Pixabay
